title: Mapping User Classes to Data Warehouse Information
description: A flowchart illustrating how different types of users interact with specific layers and information types within a data warehouse.
relationships: Executives consume summarized data from Dashboards for strategic decisions
Business Analysts use Ad-hoc Query Tools on Data Marts for tactical analysis
Data Analysts query the integrated Data Warehouse for detailed operational reporting
Data Scientists use Raw Data and OLAP tools in the Staging Area for predictive modeling
Operational Staff access pre-defined Reports from Data Marts for daily tasks
